title: Resume Quality Report
description: Rule-based evaluation of resume completeness and quality

score.description: Computed quality score based on completeness and detail

warnings.description: Quality warnings (e.g., 'Experience entries missing durations', 'Projects missing technology lists')

empty_sections.description: Expected sections that contained no data (e.g., 'certifications', 'projects')

is_scanned_pdf.description: True if the resume text extraction yielded abnormally low word count for a PDF
